templates.name: Baseline Description
templates.template: Describe what you see in this video frame in detail.

templates.name: Structured Analysis
templates.template: Analyze this video frame and provide: 1) Main subjects, 2) Actions occurring, 3) Setting/environment, 4) Notable details.

templates.name: Narrative Style
templates.template: Describe this scene as if you're narrating a story. What's happening, who's involved, and what's the context?

templates.name: Technical Details
templates.template: Provide a technical description of this frame including: composition, lighting, subjects, actions, and any text visible.

templates.name: Comprehensive Analysis
templates.template: Analyze this video frame comprehensively: describe the scene, identify all subjects and objects, explain what actions are taking place, note the setting and atmosphere, and mention any text or graphics visible.

templates.name: Evolved Gen 14
templates.template: Describe this video frame in detail as if narrating a story: identify all main subjects and objects, their actions, the setting or environment, atmosphere, any visible text or graphics, and notable contextual elements. Briefly mention technical aspects such as composition and lighting.

templates.name: Evolved Gen 1
templates.template: Analyze this video frame and provide a concise, technical description that includes: 1) Main subjects, 2) Actions occurring, 3) Setting/environment, 4) Composition and lighting, 5) Any visible text, and 6) Notable details.

templates.name: Evolved Gen 1
templates.template: Describe this video frame as if narrating a story: comprehensively explain what's happening, who is involved, the context, the setting and atmosphere, actions taking place, and note any visible text or graphics.

templates.name: Evolved Gen 12
templates.template: Describe this video frame by detailing the main subjects and objects, their actions, the setting, visible text or graphics, and any notable visual or contextual elements. Briefly include technical aspects such as composition, lighting, and overall atmosphere.

templates.name: Evolved Gen 7
templates.template: Describe this video frame as if narrating a story: clearly identify all main subjects and objects, explain their actions, detail the setting and atmosphere, and note any visible text, graphics, or contextual details to convey what’s happening and who’s involved.
